text.title: Brainstorming Techniques Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: freeform technique not allowed; missing participants, quantity_target, session_plan, scored_shortlist.

list.item: quantity_target < 20 — below this, no need for structured brainstorm.
